windowing: set-a (stride=9 non-overlap, min_seq=5); SAME base as the parallel comparand
pinned_config: cond_coupling=posterior cond_signal=softmax cond_inject=add cond_detach=True; disable_cross_attn=True (directed cat->region cascade, symmetric channel severed)
comparand_note: parallel = b4 command MINUS the 5 cascade pins (cross-attn ON); SAME device/engine/windowing/selector -> clean cascade-vs-parallel delta. NOT the board dk_ovl stride-1 champion (different base).
